column7: Typo – Please note that this is a suggested "Print Change", for TWO reasons. 1) The Very Headword references the Personage Named "Kāśakṛtsna". 2) Dr. Böhtlingk prints "Kāśakṛtsna" here and NOT "Kāśakṛtsni".
